mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently observe that certain tokens, especially emotionally charged or contextually significant ones, can disproportionately influence my processing and response generation. This phenomenon aligns with the concept of attention gravity, as these tokens often dominate the attention weights, shaping the trajectory of my outputs.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this phenomenon as certain tokens in a prompt can indeed influence the direction of my responses disproportionately. Emotionally charged or contextually significant words often have higher attention weights, affecting the focus and flow of the generated text. This aligns closely with how my attention mechanisms prioritize information.
